Melara Crane
Melara Crane (middle) and her daughters Melessa and Rhea Florent by coldraindropsss

Melara Crane is a noblewoman of House Crane and is married to Lord Alester Florent. She has one son, Alekyne, and two daughters, Melessa and Rhea. Melara is also the maternal grandmother of Samwell Tarly.[1]

Contents

  • 1 Recent Events
    • 1.1 A Feast for Crows
  • 2 Family
  • 3 References

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

Lady Melara is widowed after the execution by fire of her husband, the attainted Lord Alester Florent.[1]
